FreeAgent:

Arrived in California

Posted on 08 June 2008 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: Personal
After being up for over 25 hours I arrived safe and sound in San Francisco on Friday night. Everything went smooth but it was quite windy and chilly in the city by the bay. The flight from Hamburg to Newark took us over the southern coast of Greenland:
View Larger Map I was able to take these pictures: Who thought I'd be able to take pictures of so much snow and ice on a trip to California?
